What if big feelings had a
boss battle
— and kids actually wanted to fight them?

We made therapy techniques collectible  ✦  Kids think they're gaming. They're actually growing.

We're hand-selecting educators, therapists, and parents to test Kaijutsu — the trading card game where mindfulness became a power card and emotional intelligence levels up one epic combo at a time.

⚡ Claim Your Free Beta Kit See How It Works ↓

No cost · Shipped to you · 15 minutes of feedback

Too fun to be therapy. Too effective to be just a game.
The SEL tool that doesn't feel like one.

Co-created by parents, classroom teachers, and child development experts — tested by actual kids.

01
Receive the Game
A complete Kaijutsu beta deck — Power, Emotion, and Action Cards — shipped directly to you. Power cards for tough days, shipped free.
02
Play It With Kids
Run one session in your classroom, therapy practice, or at home. Watch what happens when emotional learning feels like an adventure.
03
Share 15 Min of Feedback
A short survey. Then keep your discount toward the full game when we launch on Kickstarter. You earned it.
Who We're Looking For

Built with people like you

Kaijutsu was co-developed by parents, teachers, and child development experts. We want feedback from the people in the room with kids every day — and the parents surviving the evenings.

📚
Educators · K–8 Teachers

Real talk from the teacher's lounge: that post-lunch chaos? The Friday-afternoon energy? You need a tool that actually works — without adding a single thing to your prep list.

15 minutes of Kaijutsu resets the whole classroom vibe. Your students will literally ask to practice their mindfulness techniques. The only SEL tool that doesn't feel like one more thing on your plate.

💬 "Friday-afternoon energy level? Play a quick Kaijutsu face-off."

CASEL Aligned Zero Prep 15-Min Sessions
🧠
Child Therapists · Counselors

Finding evidence-based activities that kids genuinely choose during free play — and request by name — is rare. Most tools feel like homework the moment the session ends.

Each Power Card is a real mindfulness or regulation technique, CASEL-aligned and disguised as a collectible. Kids think they're gaming. Clinical outcomes meet genuine engagement.

🔬 Evidence-based emotional regulation through gamified play. The SEL tool kids actually choose.

Evidence-Based CASEL Aligned Kid-Requested
🏠
Parents · Caregivers

You want something that can actually compete with a screen — and teaches something real while it's at it. (Also: you've been burned by "educational games" before. We get it.)

Yes, it's educational. No, they won't notice. They'll be too busy trading Lumi cards and leveling up their EQ. The 15-minute solution to big feelings that doesn't involve a single charger.

😄 "And yes — you'll probably steal their deck for your own stress relief."

Screen-Free Ages 8–14 Family Bonding
How the Pilot Works

Low-commitment. High impact.

Here's the thing about feelings — they don't wait for a perfect curriculum. We're not asking for your time. We're offering a power card in exchange for your honest expertise.

1

Sign up below 2 min

Tell us a little about your setting. We confirm your spot and send your beta kit out within a week. No payment. No tricks.

2

Receive & play

Run one session with the kids in your world. The rules take 3 minutes to learn. Hiro, Lumi, Rocky, and the whole crew do the heavy lifting from there.

3

Level up the game 15 min

A short survey sent to your email. What worked, what didn't, what the kids said. Your expertise shapes the final game.

4

Claim your discount You earned it

Beta pilots get early access and a guaranteed educator/professional discount when Kaijutsu launches on Kickstarter. Cards in hand, savings locked in.

What's in the Beta Kit

Everything you need to play

⚡

Power Cards

Real mindfulness techniques with Hiro, Tatami, Lumi, Stella & Rocky — disguised as collectibles

💭

Emotion Cards

Five boss-level emotions — happy, angry, sad, surprised, confused. Name them to beat them.

🎯

Action Cards

Group combo challenges that get everyone moving, laughing, and connecting — screen-free

📖

Facilitator Play Guide

Step-by-step notes and discussion prompts by grade. Zero prep. Serious fun.

🎓

SEL Framework Map

CASEL alignment guide and learning outcome overview — ready for your documentation

🏷️

Kickstarter Code

Early-backer discount locked in for every beta pilot. Your power card for savings.

5,000+ SEL champions across 73 countries committed to tools like Kaijutsu in 2024
$21B Projected size of the children's educational games market by 2031
15 min All it takes to reset an entire classroom's emotional energy. One game session. Real results.
"

The kids didn't want to stop. One student asked if she could bring the Power Cards home to teach her little brother the breathing technique. That doesn't happen with worksheets. That doesn't happen with most games either.

Beta Tester · 3rd Grade Teacher, Chicago
